title: Stock Screening Analysis Result v2
description: Output schema for the v2 stock screening pipeline. All fields are required.

stock_id.description: Unique stock identifier in format XXXXXX.SZ or XXXXXX.SH

logical_date.description: The analysis date in YYYY-MM-DD format

info_quality.description: Assessment of the available information quality: rich (abundant consistent data), sparse (limited data available), conflicting (contradictory signals), void (no usable data)

recommendation.description: Screening recommendation: include (add to watchlist), exclude (remove from consideration), hold (maintain current status pending more data)

confidence.description: Confidence level of the recommendation, from 0.0 (no confidence) to 1.0 (full confidence)

rationale.description: Detailed explanation of the recommendation including data quality assessment, key factors considered, and any caveats

behavioral_factors.description: List of behavioral finance factors that may influence the analysis or market perception of this stock

risk_flags.description: List of identified risk factors or data quality concerns
